events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cover Asset
overridableConfigKeys.description: Impassable cover tile, scattered for chokepoints.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Decorative town features: fountain, tower, siege engines, windmill, cart.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Ground Asset
overridableConfigKeys.description: Passable ground tile, tiled across the battlefield.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial unit roster (3 defenders vs 3 raiders at opposite ends) — takes priority over entity-derived units.
